author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

March Atlas Brew Schedule and CORE Trivia Game This Wednesday!

 Special CORE Trivia Game:

This Wednesday, we're going to have a special CORE trivia game before the Atlas Brew!

• 1st place will receive a Star Atlas and Magic Eden CORE cover for episode 4 as well as 1 Fimbul Lowbie!
• 2nd place will receive their choice of either a Star Atlas or Magic Eden cover of CORE episode 4!

Show up 15 minutes early to this week's Atlas Brew to participate!

 | Read CORE to prepare: https://play.staratlas.com/core-graphic-novel/

  March Schedule: 

• Economics - How will SAGE and ground racing begin to change the Star Atlas economy? (March 1)
• Politics - $POLIS in-game utility / Should people be able to trade PVP? (March 8)
• Special Brew!  (March 15)
• Game Structure - Ship Customization (March 22)
• Community Updates and Freestyle (March 29)

The events are live now at the top left of the server, if you'd like to hit the "interested" button to be notified when we're live!

 What is the Atlas Brew?

The Atlas Brew is a weekly community gathering, held on Wednesdays, where we discuss pre-determined topics, open-mic style, and have fun. We take notes during the Atlas Brew and give them to the team so your voice matters!
